ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the component (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the preference belongs to */,
  "preference_key" TEXT /* Key of the preference */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the preference (e.g., string, enumeration) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was last updated */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the preference is required */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the preference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the preference */,
  "validation_regex" TEXT /* Regular expression for validating the preference value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_preferences_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the method belongs to */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was last updated */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the method is deprecated */,
  "method_signature" TEXT /* Full method signature for better documentation */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Return type of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the preference */,
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preference being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the preference was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the preference */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the preference */,
  "is_success" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the access was successful */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the access was not successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_preference_id FOREIGN KEY ("preference_id") REFERENCES preferences ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the document belongs to */,
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preference the document belongs to */,
  "doc_text" TEXT /* Text of the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the documentation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the documentation was last updated */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the documentation is approved */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_preference_id FOREIGN KEY ("preference_id") REFERENCES preferences ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enumerations" (
  "enum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enumeration value */,
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preference the enumeration value belongs to */,
  "enum_value" TEXT /* Value of the enumeration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enumeration value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enumeration value was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the enumeration value is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enumerations_preference_id FOREIGN KEY ("preference_id") REFERENCES preferences ("preference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role is a default role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role assignment was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user-role assignment is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
